requirement.title: Scan Existing Specs Before Starting
requirement.description: Brainstorming MUST scan the specs/ directory for existing spec_ids before beginning any elicitation, to detect potential iteration scenarios.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a specs/ directory containing specs/auth/spec.xml and specs/payments/spec.xml, brainstorming MUST present both spec_ids (auth, payments) to the user before proceeding. REQ-F001
Given an empty specs/ directory, brainstorming MUST proceed directly to new-spec flow without presenting any existing spec_ids. REQ-F001

requirement.title: Route to Path A or Path B
requirement.description: After scanning, brainstorming MUST ask the user to confirm whether this is a new spec (Path A) or an iteration on an existing spec (Path B). The user's explicit confirmation determines the path.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a similar spec found, brainstorming MUST ask: "Iterating on <spec-id> (v<N> active)?" and wait for user confirmation before routing. REQ-F002
Given no matching spec, brainstorming MUST propose a spec-id and ask: "New topic — proposed spec-id: <suggestion>. OK?" before proceeding. REQ-F002
Brainstorming MUST NOT auto-detect the path without user confirmation. REQ-F002

requirement.title: Path A Output Format
requirement.description: Path A (new spec) produces a design doc at the canonical location with a REFINER_INPUT section of type: initial containing full requirements and scope.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Path A output MUST be written to docs/plans/<spec-id>/<YYYY-MM-DD>/design.md. REQ-F003
The REFINER_INPUT section MUST contain: spec_id, iteration (date), type: initial. REQ-F003
The REFINER_INPUT section MUST include at least one functional requirement and a scope declaration (includes/excludes). REQ-F003

requirement.title: Path B Reads Existing State
requirement.description: Path B (iteration) MUST read the existing spec.xml and all previous design iterations before eliciting the delta from the user.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given specs/my-feature/spec.xml at v2, brainstorming MUST read the spec.xml content during Phase 1 (Understanding) before asking the user about changes. REQ-F004
Given two previous iterations (2026-01-01, 2026-03-15), brainstorming MUST read both design docs to understand the evolution history. REQ-F004

requirement.title: Path B Output Format (Gamma Mode)
requirement.description: Path B produces a design doc in gamma mode: context summary, change intent, architecture impact, and a REFINER_INPUT with type: iteration, base_version, and a Delta section.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The REFINER_INPUT MUST contain: spec_id, iteration (date), type: iteration, base_version (integer matching the current spec version). REQ-F005
The Delta section MUST use exactly three categories: ADDED, MODIFIED, REMOVED. Each item MUST reference a requirement ID. REQ-F005
The design doc MUST include a Context section summarizing the current spec scope in 2-3 sentences, with a reference to the spec.xml version. REQ-F005

requirement.title: Spec ID Derivation and Confirmation
requirement.description: For Path A, the spec_id MUST be derived from content at the end of Phase 2 (when scope is clear) and confirmed by the user before output.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The spec_id MUST NOT be finalized before Phase 2 completes. REQ-F006
The user MUST explicitly confirm or modify the proposed spec_id before the design doc is written. REQ-F006

requirement.title: Change Type Derivation
requirement.description: The change type (extend, modify, reduce, restructure, replace) MUST be derived from delta content, not declared by the user.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a Delta with only ADDED items, the derived type MUST be "extend". REQ-F007
Given a Delta with only MODIFIED items, the derived type MUST be "modify". REQ-F007
Given a Delta with only REMOVED items, the derived type MUST be "reduce". REQ-F007
Given a Delta with both ADDED and REMOVED items, the derived type MUST be "restructure". REQ-F007
Given a type: iteration REFINER_INPUT with no Delta section and full requirements listed instead, the derived type MUST be "replace". REQ-F007
